meanings.usage: 此处表示对小礼物的喜爱和重视，后面可直接接名词作宾语

meanings.meaning: 便士（英国货币单位，penny的复数形式）
meanings.usage: 是英国辅币单位，100便士等于1英镑
用于形容人在花钱上很节省，褒义词
指物体碰到硬面后弹回，也可指人蹦跳着走
英式英语用词，对应美式英语的sidewalk
此处指路边的排水设施，作动词时意为“排空，流干”
指衣服的袖子部分，常见搭配roll up sleeves意为“卷起袖子，准备大干”
指用作润滑的油脂，也可指烹饪产生的油脂
常用搭配reward sb with sth，意为“用某物奖励某人”
此处指硬币在存钱罐里碰撞发出声响
用于修饰名词，表示超出常规的部分
表示一笔钱时，常用small/large sum来描述金额大小

phrases.usage: 表示“价值……的东西”，前面加金额，后面接名词，说明价值对应的物品

examples.en: I bought ten dollars' worth of snacks for the picnic.
examples.zh: 我买了价值十美元的零食用于野餐。

examples.en: He gave me two yuan worth of stamps.
examples.zh: 他给了我价值两元的邮票。

phrases.usage: 表示（钱、物品等）可以用很长时间，很经花；也可表示“大有帮助”

examples.en: A little kindness will go a long way when you meet people in trouble.
examples.zh: 当你遇到有困难的人时，一点善意会帮上大忙。

examples.en: If you are careful, this bottle of milk will go a long way.
examples.zh: 如果你省着点用，这瓶牛奶可以喝很久。

phrases.usage: 表示“把……兑换成/换成……”，用于物品或货币的交换

examples.en: You can exchange your leftover foreign currency for local money at the airport.
examples.zh: 你可以在机场把剩下的外币兑换成当地货币。

examples.en: He exchanged his old phone for a new one by paying extra money.
examples.zh: 他补了差价，把旧手机换成了新的。

phrases.usage: 表示“偶然到达，最终进入”，主语常是物，暗含“不经意间去到某个地方”的含义

examples.en: Many of the books I bought never found their way to the bookshelf; they just stayed on my desk.
examples.zh: 我买的很多书从来没被放到书架上，就一直摆在我的书桌上。

examples.en: The lost key finally found its way into my jacket pocket.
examples.zh: 那把丢失的钥匙最后居然在我夹克口袋里找到了。

phrases.usage: 字面意思是卷起袖子，常引申为“准备动手干活，准备大干一场”

examples.en: After finishing the plan, we rolled up our sleeves and started the project.
examples.zh: 完成计划后，我们撸起袖子开始做这个项目。

examples.en: Roll up your sleeves; we have a lot of dishes to wash today.
examples.zh: 准备干活吧，我们今天有好多盘子要洗。

phrases.usage: 插入语，意为“而且，更重要的是”，用于补充说明更严重或更重要的情况

examples.en: It's difficult to finish this task in one day, and what is more, we don't have enough tools.
examples.zh: 一天内完成这个任务很难，而且我们还没有足够的工具。

examples.en: The hotel is not comfortable, and what is more, it's far from the city center.
examples.zh: 这家酒店住起来不舒服，而且离市中心还很远。

grammar.title: 一般现在时表客观事实和普遍规律
grammar.definition: 用于描述不受时间限制的客观真理、普遍存在的事实或者经常性的习惯动作
grammar.structure: 主语 + 动词原形/动词第三人称单数形式 + 其他
grammar.usage: 当描述大众普遍认可的规律、常态情况时，不管上下文其他时态，都用一般现在时

examples.en: Children always appreciate small gifts of money.
examples.zh: 孩子们总是喜欢得到一些小额零花钱作为礼物。

examples.en: The earth moves around the sun.

grammar.title: because引导的原因状语从句
grammar.definition: 用来解释主句动作发生的原因，是最常用的原因状语从句引导词
grammar.structure: 主句 + because + 从句，或者Because + 从句, + 主句
grammar.usage: 可以用来回答why提出的问题，从句说明直接、明确的原因

examples.en: George was not too upset by his experience because the lady who owns the sweet shop heard about his troubles and rewarded him with a large box of chocolates.
examples.zh: 乔治对这次经历并没有太难过，因为糖果店的女老板听说了他遇到的麻烦，奖励了他一大盒巧克力。

examples.en: I stayed at home yesterday because it was raining heavily.
examples.zh: 我昨天待在家里，因为当时雨下得很大。

sentencePatterns.pattern: A is a small price to pay for B.

original.en: For most of them, fifty pence is a small price to pay for a nice big bar of chocolate.
original.zh: 对他们中的大多数人来说，花50便士买一大块好吃的巧克力是很值的。

imitations.en: For many students, two hours' study every day is a small price to pay for a good score in the exam.
imitations.zh: 对很多学生来说，每天学习两小时，用来换取考试的好成绩是很划算的。

imitations.en: I think getting up early is a small price to pay for the beautiful sunrise on the mountain.
imitations.zh: 我觉得为了看山上美丽的日出，早起一点是完全值得的。

original.en: I gave him fifty pence yesterday and advised him to save it. Instead, he bought himself fifty pence worth of trouble.
original.zh: 我昨天给了他50便士，劝他存起来。可他却用这50便士给自己买了麻烦。

imitations.en: My mom told me to finish my homework first. Instead, I played computer games for three hours.
imitations.zh: 我妈妈让我先写完作业。我反而玩了三个小时的电脑游戏。

imitations.en: The doctor advised him to stop drinking alcohol. Instead, he drank even more than before.
imitations.zh: 医生建议他戒酒。他反而喝得比以前更多了。

sentencePatterns.pattern: Sb did sth, and what is more, sb could not do sth.

original.en: He could not find his 50 pence piece anywhere, and what is more, he could not get his arm out.
original.zh: 他到处都找不到那50便士，而且他的胳膊还拔不出来了。

imitations.en: He missed the last bus home, and what is more, he forgot to take his house key with him.
imitations.zh: 他错过了回家的末班车，而且他还忘带家门钥匙了。

imitations.en: The team lost the important match, and what is more, their best player got injured during the game.
imitations.zh: 球队输掉了这场重要的比赛，而且他们最好的球员还在比赛中受了伤。
